title: Mechanics & Magic
description: Use Magic and/or Technology to battle a dangerous and terrifying world.
body:
This is my biggest project yet, i hope you like it!

a healthy mix of tech and magic mods, including Create, Ars Nouveau, Mekanism, Ice and Fire, and Valkyrien Skies, combined with an assortment of dungeons, dangerous structures, and creepy creatures to test your skills against.
this modpack includes expansions on undead and arthropod mobs, as well as adding several warring factions that the player can side with. 

 **Arachnophobia Warning**
if the spider-like mobs are too upsetting you can remove them by disabling 'Arthropod Phobia Expansions'

if the world generation seems too crowded or sparse for your liking, try messing with the config for Sparse Structures.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![a screenshot of two open windows, one is the config file for sparse structures opened on Notepad and the other is the file explorer open to the config folder of the modpack with sparse structures selected.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ada96487013d88f4e54ff2583eee9a568e679421.png)

</details>
